violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --- Leather strap on reach-in freezer is not designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Cutting board on prep table needs repair, deep cuts, discolored.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --- Dishwasher needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors in kitchen need to be deep cleaned.
